title: 图像裁剪
sourceRevision: unknown; inventory snapshot is frozen by source hashes
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype and the legacy 1920x1080 characterization cover every control, label, icon, conditional branch, four-edge clip rule, link behavior, auto-detection mode, threshold and target value, preview geometry, media compatibility, cache/lifecycle state, canonical persistence, resident Card shell, stable active image identity and bounded performance.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: React effect with an abortable store subscription and explicit disposal
React state/memo or a shared browser-safe domain; do not carry runes into production
One shared Reader image-trim store/DTO; Card is an editor, not a second source of truth
Reader frame/image contract or a stable current-image capability; no selector coupling in production
Stable React shell with typed style variables and explicit conditional regions
Browser-safe package export; production code must not import the scaffold

sourceUiInventory.title: AST 原型结构基线
acceptanceItems: 冻结 ImageTrimCard.svelte hash sha256:413b50582f039de6e0c563176543242b699c7e1c181322a54130bca578bc06ca
冻结 imageTrimStore.svelte.ts hash sha256:bc243bacabdd055c1c5bb6bf7c2ed84750e12522ece937b51c89433be92d1f21
原型保留单一 space-y-3 text-sm 根容器、Fragment 和 enabled 条件块
原型保留 RotateCcw、Link、Unlink、Wand2、Minus、Square 六个图标 import
原型保留 checkbox、四个 range、一个 select、三个动作按钮和条件预览
原型保留 $state/$derived、onMount/onDestroy、store subscription 为待人工替换节点
生产实现不得直接 import tsx-scaffold 或 Svelte/$lib 运行时

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 外壳、常驻面板与延迟边界
acceptanceItems: Card ID imageTrim、标题 图像裁剪、默认 control Panel、可隐藏
Card 在未打开书籍前也常驻显示设置外壳，不能把整个 Card 隐藏到 session 条件内
CardRenderer/CardWindow 复用共享折叠、隐藏、排序、宽高和独立窗口行为
图标和命令按钮使用 lucide 语义，不以新插画或文字按钮替换原图标
ImageTrim 编辑器与自动检测重逻辑保持独立 lazy chunk，不进入 Reader entry

sourceUiInventory.title: 启用开关与全部重置
acceptanceItems: 顶部同一行显示 图像裁剪 checkbox 与 RotateCcw 重置按钮
enabled 默认值、checked 语义和禁用时的条件内容与旧 store 一致
resetAll 清除四边裁剪、联动、阈值、目标和自动检测消息
重置是一个聚合命令，持久化最多产生一次配置 mutation
设置加载中显示居中的加载文案，加载失败不会留下半套控件

sourceUiInventory.title: 四边裁剪滑条
acceptanceItems: 上、下、左、右四组按旧顺序使用 space-y-1 和 text-xs 标题行
四个 range 的 min=0、max=45、step=0.5，值后显示百分号
range 使用 accent-primary h-1 w-full，拖动过程只更新本地呈现
滑条支持键盘 Home/End/方向键并暴露 min/max/now
边界值、非有限值和四边总和超过可用区域时按共享 codec 归一化

sourceUiInventory.title: 上下联动与图标状态
acceptanceItems: 上裁剪标题左侧保留 Link/Unlink 图标按钮
linkVertical=true 使用 Link text-primary h-3 w-3，false 使用 Unlink text-muted-foreground
按钮 title 在 上下联动 与 取消上下联动 之间切换
开启联动时按旧 store 取上下较大值同步，后续修改任一侧同步另一侧
图标按钮有 aria-label、visible focus 和原生键盘操作

sourceUiInventory.title: 左右联动与图标状态
acceptanceItems: 左裁剪标题左侧保留 Link/Unlink 图标按钮
linkHorizontal=true 使用 Link text-primary h-3 w-3，false 使用 Unlink text-muted-foreground
按钮 title 在 左右联动 与 取消左右联动 之间切换
开启联动时按旧 store 取左右较大值同步，后续修改任一侧同步另一侧
左右联动状态属于设置 DTO，不得藏在组件局部 state

sourceUiInventory.title: 裁剪预览指示器
acceptanceItems: 四边至少一项大于零时才显示预览，全部为零时不挂载预览 DOM
预览为 border-border bg-muted/30 relative aspect-3/4 w-full overflow-hidden rounded border
原始区域使用 bg-muted/20 absolute inset-0
有效区域使用 bg-primary/10 border-primary/30 absolute rounded-sm border
有效区域由 top/bottom/left/right 百分比直接投影
中心标签以 text-muted-foreground/60 text-[10px] 显示有效宽高百分比

sourceUiInventory.title: 自动检测、去黑边与去白边
acceptanceItems: 分隔线后保留 自动裁剪 text-muted-foreground text-xs font-medium 标题
自动检测按钮使用 Wand2，flex-1、primary tint、检测中禁用
去黑边按钮使用 Square h-3 w-3 fill-current
去白边按钮使用 Minus h-3 w-3
自动检测、去黑边、去白边都读取当前活动 img 的已解码资产，不重新请求第二张图片
动作期间按钮禁用，完成/失败/找不到图片时显示稳定消息

sourceUiInventory.title: 容差与目标颜色
acceptanceItems: 容差 range min=5、max=100、step=5，标题行实时显示数值
目标颜色 select 保留 auto、black、white 三个值和旧顺序
auto/black/white 使用原中文标签 自动/黑色/白色
目标颜色使用 bg-background border-border rounded border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs
阈值和目标改变不会自动启动检测或改变当前裁剪，直到用户触发动作

sourceUiInventory.title: 加载、检测结果与错误状态
acceptanceItems: settings 尚未就绪时显示居中 加载中... 状态
没有当前图片时显示 未找到当前图片，不伪造结果
四边均为零时显示 未检测到明显边框
检测成功显示四边一位小数结果
检测异常显示 检测失败 且允许再次触发
去黑边/去白边完成分别显示 已应用去黑边/已应用去白边

sourceUiInventory.title: 动画、视频、超分与单双页兼容
acceptanceItems: 裁边应用于当前 frame/image contract，不把图片类型假设为静态单页
动画和视频帧在切换/重绘时保持裁边设置和取消旧检测结果
单双页使用同一四边设置，不意外只裁左页或只裁右页
全景/旋转/超分产生新 generation 时拒绝旧 auto-detect 结果
不为裁边新增 sharp、Canvas、Blob 或第二条媒体解码链

sourceUiInventory.title: 设置持久化、缓存与生命周期
acceptanceItems: imageTrimStore 的所有公开设置字段均有版本化共享 DTO
autoTrimCache 作为有界检测缓存处理，不成为第二份设置真相
旧动态缓存键/坏 JSON/过期 generation 按字段归一化而不是使 Card 崩溃
设置变更使用 canonical TOML 与串行原子 PATCH，未知未来字段保留
Card 隐藏、折叠、窗口关闭、导航和 session release 时取消订阅/请求并清理定时器
imageTrace 日志不得把完整图片、Blob 或敏感路径写入热路径

items.title: 审阅 AST 生成的 TSX 原型
items.targetContract: Prototype is a repeatable structural baseline: imports, component hierarchy, class names, conditions, controls, events and unsupported Svelte nodes are reviewed before production React work.
items.notes: The scaffold is evidence only; production code must not import it.

items.title: 启用或停用图像裁剪
items.targetContract: The checkbox toggles one canonical enabled flag; disabled state keeps the Card resident but removes active crop presentation and expensive detection work.
items.notes: Verified by the 1920x1080 harness: the ready Card and enable switch are interactive before opening, and remain mounted after opening.

items.title: 一次重置全部裁剪设置
items.targetContract: One named reset restores canonical enabled, edges, link flags, threshold, target and transient message defaults and commits once.
items.notes: The shared codec and CLI restore every canonical field in one config mutation. HTTP-specific reset, GUI command evidence and TUI wiring remain incomplete.

items.title: 四边百分比裁剪
items.targetContract: Top, bottom, left and right preserve the 0..45 range, 0.5 step, labels, values and clip-path projection.
items.notes: Shared projection, serialized HTTP projection, CLI get/set/reset, Store preview/commit and real Chromium top-edge editing are covered, including one write per completed action. TUI command-level edge coverage remains partial; percentages are not converted to pixels.

items.title: 上下联动
items.targetContract: LinkVertical is shared state with exact Link/Unlink icon semantics and linked edge updates.
items.notes: Shared patch projection, serialized HTTP projection, Store state and real Chromium pointer editing prove that enabling the link synchronizes to the larger edge, later top edits synchronize bottom, and each completed action persists once. Native button keyboard behavior is retained.

items.title: 左右联动
items.targetContract: LinkHorizontal is shared state with exact Link/Unlink icon semantics and linked edge updates.
items.notes: Shared patch projection, serialized HTTP projection, Store synchronization and real Chromium pointer editing prove that enabling the link synchronizes to the larger edge, later left edits synchronize right, and each completed action persists once without component-local link state.

items.title: 裁剪值边界和归一化
items.targetContract: Reject non-finite values, clamp edges to 0..45 and preserve a non-empty effective region; imported values normalize field by field.
items.notes: The shared normalizer, strict patch parser, authenticated HTTP boundary and CLI cover finite values, 0..45 clamping/rejection and 0.5 steps without persisting invalid input. GUI boundary-key interaction plus TUI command-level evidence remain partial.

items.title: 有效裁剪区域预览
items.targetContract: Preview mounts only for non-zero crop values and shows the effective width/height percentage without touching Reader session or requesting media.
items.notes: The preview is a local geometry indicator, not a second image renderer.

items.title: 预览容器几何和标签
items.targetContract: The aspect-3/4 overflow-hidden bordered preview retains the original/effective region layers, colors, radius and centered 10px label.
items.notes: Any token adjustment must be recorded against the legacy screenshot.

items.title: 自动检测边框
items.targetContract: Wand2 automatic detection samples the current decoded image, returns four percentages, applies them atomically and reports no-border/not-found/failure states.
items.notes: The current decoded img is registered by generation, sampled only after an explicit action, bounded to a 512px longest edge and 128 points per row or column, and committed through one serialized settings write.

items.title: 去黑边预设
items.targetContract: Square action invokes the black-border preset for the current image and reports completion or failure without remounting it.
items.notes: The preset uses the legacy fixed threshold 40 and the current registered image. Unit coverage verifies the detector, store target and visible success state; a dedicated real-browser preset click remains optional evidence.

items.title: 去白边预设
items.targetContract: Minus action invokes the white-border preset for the current image and reports completion or failure without remounting it.
items.notes: The preset uses the legacy fixed threshold 40 and an explicit white target on the registered image. Unit coverage verifies the detector, store target and visible success state; a dedicated real-browser preset click remains optional evidence.

items.title: 自动检测容差
items.targetContract: AutoTrimThreshold preserves 5..100 in steps of 5 and is supplied to detection rather than silently changing manual crop values.
items.notes: CLI set/get uses the shared 5..100 step-5 codec and canonical TOML. Dedicated core, HTTP, GUI and TUI evidence remains pending.

items.title: 自动检测目标颜色
items.targetContract: AutoTrimTarget preserves the exact auto/black/white enum, labels and order.
items.notes: CLI set/get preserves auto/black/white through the shared enum validator and canonical TOML. Other surfaces and legacy-import fallback evidence remain pending.

items.title: 自动检测反馈文案
items.targetContract: Detection status is visible, bounded and replaceable; loading, success, no-border, not-found and error messages never accumulate DOM nodes.
items.notes: One inert status node replaces the prior state and covers detecting, success, no-border, unavailable and retryable error messages; cancellation produces no stale success text.

items.title: 当前媒体帧兼容
items.targetContract: Crop presentation consumes the shared current frame/image contract for static, animated and video media and never assumes a permanent DOM selector.
items.notes: CLI/TUI must expose a typed setting/result contract even when no preview exists.

items.title: 单双页裁剪策略
items.targetContract: A double-page frame applies the documented four-edge policy to the complete frame or each page according to one shared option; it must not silently crop only one side.
items.notes: The legacy source exposes the Card but the exact double-page runtime policy still needs characterization.

items.title: generation 与迟到结果
items.targetContract: Auto-detect results are committed only when image URL/media generation still matches the request; stale results are dropped and logged with a bounded trace id.
items.notes: Registration generations abort and reject stale results before preview or persistence. Bounded trace-id logging is not yet implemented, so core and evidence remain partial.

items.title: clip-path 合并与投影
items.targetContract: mergeClipPaths and trimToClipPath retain the legacy coordinate convention, percentage precision and safe composition for nested/frame crops.
items.notes: Browser-safe clip-path projection is covered by ReaderImageTrim tests and the PageImage harness; automatic detection composition remains pending.

items.title: 裁剪后的有效尺寸
items.targetContract: getEffectiveDimensions reports truthful dimensions after the crop and presentation transform without claiming an additional decoded asset.
items.notes: Source dimensions and CSS presentation dimensions remain distinct.

items.title: 唯一规范 TOML 持久化
items.targetContract: Before implementation, agree and freeze one versioned [nodes.neoview.image.*] path; serialize strict snake_case fields through a serialized atomic PATCH, preserve unknown fields and roll back on failure.
items.notes: CLI get/set/reset writes strict snake_case fields through the canonical NeoView TOML commit path and does not use a Reader database. GUI/HTTP/TUI persistence evidence remains incomplete.

items.title: 自动检测缓存边界
items.targetContract: autoTrimCache is keyed by stable media identity/generation, bounded by count/bytes, cancellable and invalidated on source changes; cache misses recompute safely.
items.notes: Legacy dynamic storage is evidence, not permission for an unbounded map.

items.title: 旧设置兼容导入
items.targetContract: Import legacy trim settings once, normalize missing fields and prevent old local state from overriding canonical TOML on later startup.
items.notes: Legacy key names and defaults must be recorded once their source settings are characterized.

items.title: 共享裁剪设置与结果 DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI use one browser-safe versioned settings/result contract for edges, links, target, threshold, media generation, effective dimensions and detection outcome.
items.notes: ReaderApp remains composition only; no GUI-only second protocol.

items.title: 默认、禁用、编辑、检测和错误状态
items.targetContract: Cover loading, default, enabled, disabled, editing, linked, previewing, detecting, no-image, no-border, success, failed, retry, pending-write, rollback and disposed states without stale values.
items.notes: Resident shell and session-dependent detection state must be distinguishable.

items.title: 订阅、请求和 Card 生命周期
items.targetContract: Card subscriptions, detection requests and cache leases are released on hide/collapse/window close/unmount/session release; no timers or observers survive.
items.notes: Card hide/unmount subscription cleanup and late persistence disposal are covered; detection/cache/session-release cleanup remains pending.

items.title: 翻页与切书取消
items.targetContract: Navigation invalidates active detection and never applies a result to a newer frame; successful navigation keeps the active img node stable when only crop CSS changes.
items.notes: No artificial detection result is emitted during initial hydration.

items.title: 裁剪与翻页动画共存
items.targetContract: Crop projection composes with page-transition transforms without replacing the frame wrapper or changing animation ownership.
items.notes: Crop must remain presentation-only; page transition remains the animation owner.

items.title: 视频和动图兼容
items.targetContract: Video/animated frames use the same crop contract or an explicit unsupported state; no static-image URL assumption or repeated decoder is introduced.
items.notes: If a media type is unsupported, the Card must expose a stable reason and keep manual settings intact.

items.title: 超分输出兼容
items.targetContract: Crop detects and applies against the currently presented/upscaled frame generation, never against a stale source or a private duplicate artifact.
items.notes: The upscale pipeline remains the artifact owner.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳与常驻行为
items.targetContract: The Card retains title, control Panel default, hideability, collapse, resize, dock/window modes and resident pre-session shell using the shared Card renderer.
items.notes: The resident shell is implemented through the shared registry and verified before/after the harness session toggle; Card window parity remains a broader shell gate.

items.title: 旧版层级、标签、图标与密度
items.targetContract: Target preserves the exact group order, Chinese labels, icon meanings, compact spacing/classes, conditional preview and action hierarchy before any intentional improvement is introduced.
items.notes: Changes to tokens, labels or icons require a recorded deviation.

items.title: 1920x1080 与窄 Card 几何
items.targetContract: The Card remains readable at 1920x1080 and constrained dock/window widths with no horizontal overflow, clipped labels or overlapping controls; 1920x1080 is the primary baseline.
items.notes: Terminal Playwright evidence covers 1920x1080 and an 860x720 constrained dock with visible automatic controls and no horizontal overflow.

items.title: 原生控件与图标命令可访问
items.targetContract: Checkbox, ranges, select, icon buttons and async actions have accessible names, native keyboard behavior, visible focus and non-stolen focus during detection.
items.notes: Titles alone are not sufficient for icon-only commands.

items.title: 裁剪操作不重挂活动图片
items.targetContract: Changing edges, links, threshold, target or detection preview preserves the exact active media node and asset identity and creates no duplicate request/decode.
items.notes: The 1920x1080 harness counts the fixture request, performs real detection and manual edits, and verifies one request plus the exact same img object and asset URL throughout.

items.title: 采样、DOM、缓存与热路径预算
items.targetContract: Manual slider updates are O(1) and end-only for persistence; detection samples a bounded number of pixels once per media generation; cache, DOM and timers remain bounded and Reader navigation stays within existing gates.
items.notes: Detection is explicit-only, dynamically imported, canvas-bounded to 512px and line-bounded to 128 samples; it creates no second image, cache or timer. Reader navigation and CLI/TUI performance gates remain pending.

items.title: 独立延迟 chunk
items.targetContract: ImageTrimCard and detection code stay in an independently auditable deferred chunk with an explicit byte ceiling and no Node builtin in the browser graph.
items.notes: Production audit proves an independent 8,583-byte Card chunk and 1,893-byte action-only detector chunk with no Node browser external; the separate global entry gate is not weakened.

items.title: 旧版与目标 1920x1080 截图
items.targetContract: A terminal script captures the expanded legacy Card and target Card at 1920x1080, including enabled/disabled, non-zero preview and auto controls; evidence compares hierarchy, labels, icons, density and geometry.
items.notes: Legacy baseline and target screenshot are both captured by terminal scripts at 1920x1080. The target covers resident, enabled, non-zero crop, auto controls and post-open interaction; pixel-level parity remains partial.

items.title: 记录有意改进与替代契约
items.targetContract: Document any replacement of direct DOM lookup, unbounded legacy cache, per-input writes, second-image sampling, media limitations or token changes while preserving visible control semantics.
items.notes: Intentional improvements replace global DOM lookup and a second Image load with decoded-img registration, remove the 200-entry URL cache, defer the detector chunk until explicit use, and replace per-input writes with preview plus end-only commit. Animated/video/media policy and CLI/TUI documentation remain pending.

items.title: 检测失败与重试
items.targetContract: Detection errors leave the last valid manual settings intact, expose a retryable state and do not poison the cache or disable unrelated controls.
items.notes: Detector or persistence failure preserves or restores the last confirmed settings, shows a retryable alert and leaves all unrelated controls usable.

items.title: 检测取消
items.targetContract: Navigation, hide, unmount or explicit cancellation aborts detection and leaves no pending request, timer or stale success message.
items.notes: Image replacement, navigation registration changes, Card hide/unmount and store disposal abort the active signal; cancelled work neither persists nor reports failure or stale success.

items.title: 单双页和页面布局策略
items.targetContract: The shared layout contract explicitly states how crop percentages apply to single page, double page and panorama frames, including RTL/rotation.
items.notes: This remains a partial boundary until the old runtime policy is characterized.

items.title: 重置和未完成边界
items.targetContract: The compatibility record stays partial until auto detection, persistence, media layout and visual evidence are implemented; reset must not be marked complete by a UI-only mock.
items.notes: Current status is intentionally partial: manual edge editing, shared persistence and CSS projection are implemented; automatic detection, border presets, media policy, cache/lifecycle and full visual parity remain incomplete.
